title: Steel at the Gate
intro: It came due at last. A war-band of the Warrior-Guild stands in Runehold's frost at first light — the same steel you drew on, years ago, come to collect. "You struck first, Wizard," their leader says, plain as weather. "We have long memories, and short patience left."

advisors.text: We knew this day would come the moment you chose it, Archon. Muster the coven — better to answer steel standing than kneeling.
Or buy them off, if there is anything left to buy them with. A hold that fights the Warriors to the last is a hold that ends.

choices.label: Meet them with rune and fire

win.text: Wards flare, the frost catches light, and the war-band breaks against Runehold's stones. Steel will think twice before it comes here again.

lose.text: Your fire is not enough. They come over the walls, and Runehold pays in blood and grain for the day you drew first.

win.text: It galls, and it costs, but coin closes the ledger. The war-band rides, and the grudge with them.
